name: Akasha Hub
tagline: Independent hub for technology, art and regenerative experimentation
description: Akasha Hub is a space connecting technology, ESG innovation and artistic practices through residencies, events and collaborative research. Located in the heart of Barcelona, it serves as a bridge between web3 communities, creative practitioners and sustainability researchers.

spaces.name: Main Hall
spaces.notes: Suitable for talks, workshops and community gatherings

spaces.name: Lab Space
spaces.notes: Equipped with 3D printers, electronics stations and VR equipment

spaces.name: Rooftop Garden
spaces.notes: Urban garden with seating, ideal for informal gatherings

accommodation.notes: Limited in-house accommodation, best for short stays of 1-2 weeks

assets.name: AV Production Suite
assets.notes: Full audio-visual production suite for livestreaming and recording

assets.name: Ethereum Node
assets.notes: Dedicated Ethereum validator node for research and community use

assets.name: Digital Library
assets.notes: Curated collection of open-access research and educational materials

challenges.title: Improve documentation and public storytelling
challenges.problem_description: The hub has many activities but lacks clear public-facing materials and internal documentation.
challenges.expected_solution: A reusable documentation system, a clearer website structure and a lightweight editorial workflow.

challenges.title: Build sustainable revenue beyond grants
challenges.problem_description: Current revenue heavily depends on grant cycles, creating uncertainty.
challenges.expected_solution: A tiered membership program combined with optimized space rental strategy and event ticketing model.
